personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Azure / Cloud DevOps Specialist

summary: Senior Cloud/DevOps Data Engineer with extensive experience in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, and cloud data pipeline automation. Skilled in Azure Data Factory, Databricks, Power BI CI/CD pipelines, and governance for production-grade analytics environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and implemented Python/PySpark ETL pipelines across large-scale telemetry data ingestion using AWS and GCP cloud services.
Built automated GenAI and Python orchestration workflows for real-time and batch analytics pipelines.
Developed dashboards and automated reporting pipelines with Streamlit, matplotlib, and plotly.
Integrated monitoring and observability tools (Dynatrace, CA APM, AppDynamics) into CI/CD pipelines ensuring reliability and data quality.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Python-based data pipelines with telemetry integration and API connectors.
Implemented ETL validation, automated testing, and quality checks for operational analytics.
Collaborated with engineering and analytics teams to optimize pipeline performance.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: Azure (ADF, Databricks, Key Vault, ADLS), AWS/GCP concepts, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, Data Modeling, Data Warehousing
skills.Big Data: Event-driven pipelines, batch processing, Delta Lake, Databricks SQL Warehousing
skills.Orchestration & Tools: CI/CD pipelines, Git/GitHub Actions, FastAPI, Airflow, Docker
skills.Monitoring / Observability: Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights, Dynatrace, CA APM
skills.AI/ML: GenAI / LLM pipelines, Python automation, text-to-SQL agents
skills.Visualization & Reporting: Power BI deployment pipelines, Streamlit, matplotlib, plotly dashboards

projects.name: Azure DevOps & Databricks CI/CD Pipelines
projects.description: Built automated ETL pipelines and analytic deployments in Azure using Data Factory, Databricks, and Power BI. Integrated monitoring, validation, and GenAI-assisted orchestration for production-grade analytics supporting VA healthcare insights.
